# Cue Repository Context

This file is the expanded repo map for tools that want more context than `llms.txt`.

## Project Summary

- Product: Cue
- Type: image-first desktop app
- Public release today: source plus a verified macOS DMG
- Desktop shell: Tauri
- Native runtime: Rust
- Public configuration: prefer `CUE_*`; `BROOD_*` remains as a temporary compatibility fallback

## Read First

- [`README.md`](README.md)
- [`PRD.md`](PRD.md)
- [`AGENTS.md`](AGENTS.md)
- [`docs/README.md`](docs/README.md)
- [`docs/legacy-internals.md`](docs/legacy-internals.md)

## Optional Intake

- [`agent-intake.json`](agent-intake.json)
- [`docs/aip-1.schema.json`](docs/aip-1.schema.json)
- [`docs/agent_intake_status.md`](docs/agent_intake_status.md)
- [`docs/agent_intake_roundtrip.sample.json`](docs/agent_intake_roundtrip.sample.json)

If intake is unavailable, use [`llms.txt`](llms.txt) and the fallback entrypoints in [`agent-intake.json`](agent-intake.json).

## Helpful Docs

- [`docs/desktop.md`](docs/desktop.md)
- [`docs/agent-runtime.md`](docs/agent-runtime.md)
- [`docs/local-magic-select-runtime.md`](docs/local-magic-select-runtime.md)
- [`docs/macos-local-private-image-editing.md`](docs/macos-local-private-image-editing.md)
- [`docs/benchmark-playbook.md`](docs/benchmark-playbook.md)
- [`RELEASING.md`](RELEASING.md)

## High-Signal Source Entrypoints

- [`desktop/src/canvas_app.js`](desktop/src/canvas_app.js)
- [`desktop/src/index.html`](desktop/src/index.html)
- [`desktop/src/styles.css`](desktop/src/styles.css)
- [`desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs`](desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs)
- [`desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json`](desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json)
- [`desktop/src/magic_select_runtime.js`](desktop/src/magic_select_runtime.js)
- [`rust_engine/crates/brood-cli/src/main.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-cli/src/main.rs)
- [`rust_engine/crates/brood-engine/src/lib.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-engine/src/lib.rs)
- [`rust_engine/crates/brood-contracts/src/events.rs`](rust_engine/crates/brood-contracts/src/events.rs)

## Validation

- `cd desktop && npm test`
- `cd desktop && npm run build`
- `cd desktop/src-tauri && cargo check`
- `cd rust_engine && cargo check`
- `./scripts/release_check.sh`
- `./scripts/check_agent_entrypoints.py`

## Release Notes

- public verification is strongest on macOS
- release assets and GitHub Releases should use the Cue name
- Homebrew is still out of scope for the first public launch
